E_eq_0|epic_meaning.title: Lakho learners ne yahan se start kiya
E_eq_0|epic_meaning.body: Ab teri baari! {chapter_name} se ek naye mission ka hissa ban.

E_eq_0|epic_meaning.title: Tera English journey yahan se shuru hota hai
E_eq_0|epic_meaning.body: Career transform karne wale 10L+ learners ki community mein aa.

E_eq_0|epic_meaning.title: Kuch bada hone wala hai
E_eq_0|epic_meaning.body: {character_name} ki story shuru ho rahi hai — aur tu uska part hai.

E_eq_0|unpredictability.title: Ek surprise tere liye wait kar raha hai
E_eq_0|unpredictability.body: {chapter_name} mein kuch unexpected hai — tap karke dekh.

E_eq_0|unpredictability.title: Guess karo kya hoga {chapter_name} mein?
E_eq_0|unpredictability.body: {character_name} ke saath ek adventure shuru hone wala hai...

E_eq_0|unpredictability.title: Mystery quest unlocked
E_eq_0|unpredictability.body: {quest_title} mein hidden challenge hai. Ready ho?

E_eq_0|social_influence.title: 1,847 learners ne aaj start kiya
E_eq_0|social_influence.body: {chapter_name} sabse trending quest hai abhi. Tu bhi try kar?

E_eq_0|social_influence.title: Tera batch peeche nahi rehta
E_eq_0|social_influence.body: Sabne {quest_title} shuru kar diya — tu kab start karega?

E_eq_0|social_influence.title: Community mein buzz hai
E_eq_0|social_influence.body: {character_name} ki story sabko pasand aa rahi hai. Check kar?

E_lt_40|empowerment.title: Aaj kya seekhna hai? Tu decide kar
E_lt_40|empowerment.body: {chapter_name} mein multiple paths hain — tera pace, tera choice.

E_lt_40|empowerment.title: Easy ya challenging? Tere haath mein
E_lt_40|empowerment.body: {quest_title} ko apne level pe try kar. No pressure.

E_lt_40|empowerment.title: Tera next step, teri choice
E_lt_40|empowerment.body: {chapter_name} mein {character_name} ke saath aage badh ya revision kar.

E_lt_40|accomplishment.title: Pehla step complete — great start!
E_lt_40|accomplishment.body: {quest_title} mein progress dikha raha hai. Keep going!

E_lt_40|accomplishment.title: Chhota milestone, bada impact
E_lt_40|accomplishment.body: {chapter_name} mein tune naye words seekhe. Har step counts.

E_lt_40|accomplishment.title: Growing strong!
E_lt_40|accomplishment.body: {chapter_progress} — tu sahi track pe hai. Aur thoda aage?

E_lt_40|unpredictability.title: Surprise challenge in {quest_title}
E_lt_40|unpredictability.body: {character_name} ne ek twist daal diya — handle kar payega?

E_lt_40|unpredictability.title: Something new just dropped
E_lt_40|unpredictability.body: {chapter_name} mein naya content aaya hai — pehle kisine nahi dekha.

E_lt_40|unpredictability.title: Random reward waiting!
E_lt_40|unpredictability.body: {quest_title} complete karo aur mystery prize unlock karo.

E_lt_70|accomplishment.title: {chapter_progress} complete — solid!
E_lt_70|accomplishment.body: Tu consistently seekh raha hai. Bahut kam log itna aate hain.

E_lt_70|accomplishment.title: New badge earned!
E_lt_70|accomplishment.body: {chapter_name} mein 'Consistent Learner' badge mila. Proud moment.

E_lt_70|accomplishment.title: Halfway mark cross kiya!
E_lt_70|accomplishment.body: {quest_title} mein tera score top 20% mein hai. Well done!

E_lt_70|ownership.title: Tera vocabulary vault bhar raha hai
E_lt_70|ownership.body: {chapter_name} se naye words add hue teri collection mein.

E_lt_70|ownership.title: Progress saved — tera hai ye sab
E_lt_70|ownership.body: {chapter_progress} ka progress tere account mein safe hai.

E_lt_70|ownership.title: Tu build kar raha hai kuch khaas
E_lt_70|ownership.body: {quest_title} ke baad teri skill profile aur strong hui.

E_lt_70|social_influence.title: Tera rank: Top 30% learners mein
E_lt_70|social_influence.body: {chapter_name} mein 2,340 learners ke saath compete kar raha hai.

E_lt_70|social_influence.title: Friends aage nikal rahe hain
E_lt_70|social_influence.body: {quest_title} pe sabka engagement badh raha hai. Tera turn.

E_lt_70|social_influence.title: Community highlight
E_lt_70|social_influence.body: {chapter_name} ki story pe 4.5K reactions aaye hain. Join karo.

E_gte_70|accomplishment.title: Power learner status unlocked!
E_gte_70|accomplishment.body: {chapter_progress} done — tu top 5% mein hai. Legend.

E_gte_70|accomplishment.title: Another quest crushed!
E_gte_70|accomplishment.body: {quest_title} mein perfect score. Aisi consistency rare hai.

E_gte_70|accomplishment.title: Tera growth insane hai
E_gte_70|accomplishment.body: Is month {chapter_name} mein 50+ new concepts mastered.

E_gte_70|ownership.title: Tera empire bada ho raha hai
E_gte_70|ownership.body: Badges, vocabulary, streaks — sab kuch tera. Protect it.

E_gte_70|ownership.title: Gold streak — guard it!
E_gte_70|ownership.body: {quest_title} ke baad teri streak gold level pe hai.

E_gte_70|ownership.title: Your learning portfolio
E_gte_70|ownership.body: {chapter_progress} worth of skills teri profile mein saved.

E_gte_70|loss_avoidance.title: Tera streak danger mein hai!
E_gte_70|loss_avoidance.body: Sirf ek 5-min lesson se save ho jayega. Itna effort waste mat kar.

E_gte_70|loss_avoidance.title: {chapter_name} ka progress fade ho raha
E_gte_70|loss_avoidance.body: 3 din aur skip kiya toh review se start karna padega.

E_gte_70|loss_avoidance.title: Don't let it slip
E_gte_70|loss_avoidance.body: {quest_title} mein 87% complete tha — finish line pass hai.
